'''ngayolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldsquaw|oldsquaw]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldsquaw|oldsquaw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngayolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæyeleth|ngæyeleth]] || [[word:ngæyelej|ngæyelej]] || [[word:ngæyelesh|ngæyelesh]] || [[word:ngæyele|ngæyele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayoyoloth|ngayoyoloth]] || [[word:ngayoyoloj|ngayoyoloj]] || [[word:ngayoyolosh|ngayoyolosh]] || [[word:ngayoyolo|ngayoyolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayoloth|ngayoloth]] || [[word:ngayoloj|ngayoloj]] || [[word:ngayolosh|ngayolosh]] || [[word:ngayolo|ngayolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayofloth|ngayofloth]] || [[word:ngayofloj|ngayofloj]] || [[word:ngayoflosh|ngayoflosh]] || [[word:ngayoflof|ngayoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngayolotho|ngayolotho]] || [[word:ngayolojo|ngayolojo]] || [[word:ngayolosho|ngayolosho]] || [[word:ngayoloko|ngayoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngayoloth|ngayoloth]] || [[word:ngayoloj|ngayoloj]] || [[word:ngayolosh|ngayolosh]] || [[word:ngayolo|ngayolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngayolothol|ngayolothol]] || [[word:ngayolojol|ngayolojol]] || [[word:ngayoloshol|ngayoloshol]] || [[word:ngayolokol|ngayolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngayolothotho|ngayolothotho]] || [[word:ngayolojojo|ngayolojojo]] || [[word:ngayoloshosho|ngayoloshosho]] || [[word:ngayoloko|ngayoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngayolothon|ngayolothon]] || [[word:ngayolojon|ngayolojon]] || [[word:ngayoloshon|ngayoloshon]] || [[word:ngayolokon|ngayolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngayolothoro|ngayolothoro]] || [[word:ngayolojoro|ngayolojoro]] || [[word:ngayoloshoro|ngayoloshoro]] || [[word:ngayolokoro|ngayolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
